mapper.sql: id, out_trade_no, username, product_code, amount_fen, currency, status, wx_prepay_id, wx_code_url, wx_transaction_id, expire_at, paid_at, closed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_order (out_trade_no, username, product_code, amount_fen, currency, status, wx_prepay_id, wx_code_url, expire_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{outTradeNo}, #{username}, #{productCode}, #{amountFen}, #{currency}, #{status}, #{wxPrepayId}, #{wxCodeUrl}, #{expireAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_order SET status = 'SUCCESS', wx_transaction_id = #{wxTransactionId}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo} AND status = 'PAYING'
